title: 2-Ingredient Pancakes
steps: Mash the bananas well in a bowl.
Whisk in the eggs until smooth.
Cook small spoonfuls on a lightly oiled pan, 2 min per side.

title: Overnight Oats
steps: Stir everything together in a jar.
Cover and leave in the fridge overnight.
Top with fruit before eating.

title: Tomato Cheese Toastie
steps: Butter the outside of both slices.
Fill with cheese and sliced tomato.
Fry 3 min per side until golden.

title: Tuna Jacket Potato
steps: Bake the potato 50 min at 200C until soft.
Mix tuna with mayo and chopped onion.
Split the potato and pile the filling in.

title: One-Pan Sausage and Peppers
steps: Heat the oven to 200C.
Chop peppers and onion, toss with oil in a tray.
Add sausages and roast 30 min, turning once.

title: Garlic Butter Pasta
steps: Boil the pasta until just tender.
Melt butter, add sliced garlic, cook 1 min.
Toss the drained pasta through and top with parmesan.

title: Three-Ingredient Chocolate Mousse
steps: Melt the chocolate and let it cool a little.
Whisk the egg whites with the sugar to soft peaks.
Fold yolks then whites into the chocolate; chill 2 hours.

title: Grilled Peaches with Honey
steps: Halve the peaches and remove the stones.
Grill cut side down for 4 min.
Drizzle with honey and serve with yoghurt.

title: Cinnamon Apple Slices
steps: Core and slice the apple thinly.
Toss with cinnamon and sugar.
Bake 15 min at 180C until the edges curl.

title: Garlic Herb Popcorn
steps: Pop the kernels in a covered pan.
Melt the butter with garlic powder.
Pour over and shake with herbs and salt.

title: Iced Mint Lemonade
steps: Squeeze the lemons into a jug.
Stir in sugar until dissolved.
Add mint, water and plenty of ice.

title: Spiced Hot Chocolate
steps: Warm the milk without boiling it.
Whisk in the chopped chocolate.
Stir through the spices and serve hot.
